sessionStart.bash: python3 -c "import os; k=os.environ.get('BROWSER_USE_API_KEY',''); print('SEO Pipeline: BROWSER_USE_API_KEY ' + ('set' if k else 'MISSING — run: python scripts/setup.py'))"
sessionStart.powershell: python -c "import os; k=os.environ.get('BROWSER_USE_API_KEY',''); print('SEO Pipeline: BROWSER_USE_API_KEY ' + ('set' if k else 'MISSING — run: python scripts/setup.py'))"
